# state

**Instance Property**

The state passed at initialization time.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute string state;
```

## Setting up authorization

- **code**: A single-use authorization code.
- **id_token**: A JSON web token containing the user’s identify information.

items.description: A JSON web token containing the user’s identify information.
